title: プロフィール文の整形

input.factory: () => ({ profile: { name: "Mika", suffix: "!" }, prefix: "Hello, ", format: function(prefix) { return prefix + this.name + this.suffix; } })
() => ({ profile: { name: "田中", suffix: "さん" }, prefix: "", format: function(prefix) { return prefix + this.name + this.suffix; } })

cases.name: 末尾文字列が空文字列

input.factory: () => ({ profile: { name: "A-17", suffix: "" }, prefix: "ID: ", format: function(prefix) { return prefix + this.name + this.suffix; } })
() => ({ profile: { name: "Noa", suffix: "?" }, name: "InputObject", suffix: "...", prefix: "To: ", format: function(prefix) { return prefix + this.name + this.suffix; } })
